description: Binary pass/fail criteria for ad creative CPA optimization

criteria.name: cpa_below_baseline
criteria.description: Cost per acquisition must be lower than current control

criteria.name: ctr_stable
criteria.description: Click-through rate must not drop below baseline

criteria.name: budget_within_cap
criteria.description: Daily spend must stay within approved budget cap

criteria.name: minimum_impressions
criteria.description: At least 200 impressions per variant before evaluation

criteria.name: content_policy_compliant
criteria.description: Ad creative passes Meta content policy review

criteria.name: relevance_score_stable
criteria.description: Ad relevance score must not drop below 5

criteria.name: observation_window_met
criteria.description: Minimum 72 hours and $50 spend before evaluation

criteria.name: single_emotion_per_ad
criteria.description: Creative follows one-emotion rule per MonteKristo creative lessons
